notes: SHIP v1.14.298 - N-09: FORGE 3D-aisle door re-home (owner 'go with those defaults, ship it'). RECON: forge3d_open() (L18008), the #forge3d-sheet overlay (opens via .open class) and forge3d_close() (wired to the sheet close) all exist and work, but forge3d_open() had ZERO call sites - the door was fully orphaned when the app moved to the 3-tab nav (exactly the N-09 premise). No other/legacy FORGE doors found (no hamburger, no dev link, no AISLE-tab-on-rack-list) - so 'one way in' is automatic; nothing to close. BUILD (2 surgical edits): (1) AISLE launcher pill added to the rack-detail .reh-3d-toggle strip, after 3D -> FLAT|3D|AISLE|CABLES (CABLES appendChilds after, order preserved). It is class .reh-3d-seg with NO is-on (never renders selected) and onclick=forge3d_open() DIRECTLY (not reh3d_setMode), so the locked invariant holds: RACK_VIEW_KEY never holds '3d'/'aisle', AISLE is a momentary door not a view state. Redesign-only (the toggle renders under redesign_isOn). (2) forge3d_close() now resets the revealed rack detail to a clean live FLAT view (guarded reh3d_setMode('flat')) - opening the aisle disposes the rack-detail 3D context (iOS one-GL-context ceiling), so without this the reveal would show a stale is-3d class over a blank mount. APPROVED DEFAULTS honored: default-slot open (forge3d_open takes NO focus param - aisle is NOT centered on the user's rack; rack-centering would be a separate FORGE change) + FLAT-on-return. DEVIATIONS/NOT-DONE (flagged): (a) BACK/out - kept the existing app-standard .rd-sheet-close (X, forge3d_close -> returns to rack detail) as the single way out per the doc's overlay allowance ('BACK button alone is acceptable'); did NOT add a top-left rack-detail-style chevron or touch the SHARED .rd-sheet-close class (40x40, used by every sheet, device-verified) - a distinct top-left BACK is an optional FORGE-scoped follow-up. (b) orphan-state close-on-eviction SKIPPED: master eviction is console-only (phantom_clearMaster, not UI-wired) and the aisle is a full-screen overlay so no site-switch UI is reachable while open - there is no path to orphan it; if a UI eviction is ever added, wire forge3d_close() there. Three-stamp .297->.298; braces 11737->11740 (+3 = the guarded if/try/catch), balanced; CRLF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): open a rack detail -> AISLE pill sits after 3D (never highlighted/selected) -> tap opens the FORGE 3D aisle -> X returns to the SAME rack detail in FLAT (no blank 3D canvas); no other door opens the aisle. Backlog remaining (owner-sequenced): N-06 Rail Compass, N-10..N-18, N-13(b) ref audit, remaining CLEAN (R3 BOM/null-lookup). Batch device-verify .286->.298 still open.
